claim_title: Core package size is 39 files and 17,759 lines

results.description: Count Python files and lines under cohort_projections package.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
files = list(Path("cohort_projections").rglob("*.py"))
lines = sum(sum(1 for _ in f.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) for f in files)
print(f"CORE_PY_FILES={len(files)}")
print(f"CORE_PY_LINES={lines}")
if len(files) == 39 and lines == 17759:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
